name: agent
syntax: /agent move <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent turn <direction: left|right> | /agent attack <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent destroy <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent place <slotNum: int> <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent interact <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent till <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent inspect <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent inspectdata <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent detect <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent detectredstone <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent transfer <slotNum: int> <quantity: int> <dstSlotNum: int> | /agent collect <item: string> | /agent drop <slotNum: int> <quantity: int> <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent dropall <direction: forward|back|left|right|up|down> | /agent getitemcount <slotNum: int> | /agent getitemspace <slotNum: int> | /agent getitemdetail <slotNum: int> | /agent tp <x y z>
description: 控制Agent NPC执行各种操作（教育版特性）

examples.description: 让Agent放置槽位0的物品到前方

bedrock_specific_notes: agent命令是基岩版教育版特有命令。Agent是一个可编程机器人，支持移动、破坏、放置、检测等操作。需要先用/createagent创建Agent。常用于教学编程概念。
